headline: How I approach product design from research to delivery.
description: A structured yet flexible process that ensures every product is grounded in user needs and business goals.

stages.title: Research
stages.description: Understanding users, business goals, and product challenges through stakeholder discussions, competitor analysis, and AI-assisted research.

stages.title: Define
stages.description: Translating insights into clear problem statements, user flows, and product requirements.

stages.title: Design
stages.description: Creating wireframes, design systems, prototypes, and scalable interfaces focused on usability and consistency.

stages.title: Validate
stages.description: Testing concepts, gathering feedback, and refining experiences through iterative improvements.

stages.title: Deliver
stages.description: Collaborating with developers and stakeholders to ensure seamless implementation and product quality.

aiWorkflow.title: AI-Assisted Workflow
aiWorkflow.description: Leveraging AI tools to accelerate research, ideation, and content generation while maintaining human-centered quality.
